nasb.text: Jair the son of Manasseh took all the region of Argob as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and called it, that is, Bashan, after his own name, Havvoth-jair, as it is to this day.)

esv.text: Jair the Manassite took all the region of Argob, that is, Bashan, as far as the border of the Geshurites and the Maacathites, and called the villages after his own name, Havvoth-jair, as it is to this day.)

cnv.text: 瑪拿西的兒子睚珥，佔了亞珥歌全境，直到基述人和瑪迦人的邊界，就按著自己的名字稱巴珊全境為哈倭特．睚珥，直到今日。

ccb.text: 玛拿西的子孙雅珥得到亚珥歌伯全境，远至基述人和玛迦人的边界。他按自己的名字给那地方取名叫哈倭特·雅珥，沿用至今。
